title: Wedding Planner Checklist
text:
## Wedding Planner Checklist

Before the ceremony, confirm that {person} has the rings, the {job} has the microphone, and the {animal} has left the {place}.

Centerpieces should include {number} {plural noun}, one {color} {object}, and no visible {food} stains.

If anyone begins {verb ending in -ing}, signal the band to {verb} {adverb}.

Emergency kit: tape, tissues, spare {clothing item}, and a {adjective} {noun}.

Final mood should be {emotion}, not {adjective} or {silly word}.
